title: leptopus decaisnei var. orbicularis
intro: Leptopus decaisnei var. orbicularis, also known as the Chinese water-clover or water-clover, is a plant species native to East Asia and known for its medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leptopus decaisnei var. orbicularis include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it is also used topically in the form of poultices or creams.
